remarks: Very rare opportunity to own a multi-family in Rowayton! - Walk / bike to the center of Rowayton and along the water from this fantastic 2 family home! - Also just across the street from the Rowayton Metro North train station, making this property a commuter's dream! - Home has been well-maintained with many updates over recent years! - 1st floor unit was totally renovated in 2022, and features an updated kitchen with white shaker-style cabinets, quartz counters, custom tile backsplash, stainless steel appliances, and a shiplap feature wall! - Brand new stove and microwave (2026) - Hardwood floors throughout, LED lighting, and freshly painted - Updated bathroom with subway tile shower and newer vanity - Newer vinyl windows - Great mudroom entry area offers lots of extra space! || 2nd floor unit features a large, eat-in kitchen with stainless steel range - Updated bathroom with subway tile shower - Hardwood floors - Walk up attic / unfinished 3rd floor for lots of storage + potential expansion || The stone patio at the front corner of the house is great a lounging / grilling / hangout area - Newer driveway leads to a detached 2 car garage with additional unfinished storage loft above the garage! - Each unit has its own separately metered electric, hot water, and forced-air oil furnace! || ** Multiple offers - Highest and Best due by Thursday 5/28 @ 12 noon **
